description: Triggered when the user wants to reduce churn, design cancel flows, implement save offers, set up dunning for failed payments, or build retention strategies for SaaS products.
should_trigger: Help me design a cancellation flow for our SaaS with exit survey and save offers
How do I reduce involuntary churn from failed payments?
Set up a dunning email sequence for Stripe failed payments
What discount should I offer when users try to cancel?
Create save offer logic that matches the reason users give for cancelling
How do I implement a subscription pause option to prevent cancellations?
Design win-back strategy for customers who already cancelled
should_not_trigger: Write a promotional email for our new feature launch
How do I set up Stripe subscriptions from scratch?
Create an onboarding checklist for new users
How do I design a pricing page with anchoring?
